title: Clear Records/Leaderboard and Mnestic Experience Reflectrial

texts: You can now submit clear records to Reflectrial and Refraction Railway Encounters. Records will appear on a leaderboard sorted by turn count. You can include notes, screenshots, and a video link of your clear.
Added the Mnestic Experience Reflectrial encounter.
Changed the What's New section on the homepage to always show the first item even while collapsed.
